title: Turkish Corn Manti with Lamb and Festive Touch
description: A twist on the traditional Turkish manti, incorporating festive flavors and briny elements.
instructions: Prepare manti dough according to package instructions.
In a pan, cook lamb ground over medium heat until browned.
Add chopped parsley, dried cranberries, and a pinch of salt. Stir well.
Place a spoonful of lamb mixture onto the center of each manti dough square.
Fold the dough squares into triangles, and press edges to seal.
Place corn husks in a baking dish, and lay manti on top.
Cover with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
